goal: Make a classic Pac-Man maze game. Use a valid 2D maze grid of walls and corridors. Pac-Man and 4 ghosts must SPAWN ON CORRIDOR cells (never inside a wall). Keep ONE coordinate convention (tile or pixel) for both movement and the wall check so Pac-Man actually moves and cannot pass through walls. Ghosts must be drawn every frame and chase Pac-Man through corridors only. Arrow keys move Pac-Man. Eat dots to score.
